title: November Rain Guitar Solo 1
youtube_description:
🔶 Tabs on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/posts/73013377
🛒 Shop for Guitar Gear on Reverb:  https://reverb.grsm.io/sped

🎩 My Hat: http://www.otheruk.com/spedspedding 

Today we are learning how to play GUITAR SOLO 1 from November Rain by Guns N' Roses.

I shared a few Guns shorts earlier this year at the same time the new Thor film was hitting cinemas. Safe to say they went fairly wild. I thought it would be cool to run them through as a triplet of lessons.

Have fun.

#NovemberRain #GunsNRoses #GuitarLessons #ElectricGuitar #Slash #GuitarTeacher #GunsAndRoses

🔶Gear I use: https://www.amazon.co.uk/shop/spedspedding
♦️FOLLOW ME: https://linktr.ee/spedspedding


00:00 - Story Time
01:30 - Example
02:28 - Tuning & Scales
03:59 - Lesson
19:40 - Final Thoughts

title: Smells Like Teen Spirit
youtube_description:
#LeLocalDeRépèt' #LaMinuteRépèt' #tutoguitare #tablatureguitare

SMELLS LIKE TEEN SPIRIT - MOINS D'UNE HEURE POUR APPRENDRE : un grand classique de la guitare, que l'on vous décortique afin que tout le monde puisse l'apprendre.

Lien vers la tab : https://drive.google.com/file/d/1vkIVgXuGfsMspIpKFOZRd5qGh0M8PXM7/view?usp=sharing

Bienvenue au Local!
Si vous avez appréciez notre travail, n'hésitez pas à :
- Mettre un pouce bleu
- Donner un commentaire, poser une question
- Vous abonner
- Partager le lien à vos amis

Rendez-vous sur :
La chaîne : https://www.youtube.com/LeLocalDeRépèt
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/LeLocalDeRepet

Aidez-nous à grandir, on compte sur vous!

L'équipe de Le Local De Répèt'

title: La Grange (Live From Gruene Hall)
youtube_description:
Watch GIGS on Samsung TV Plus: https://www.samsungtvplus.com?action=play&target_tab=discover&target_id=GBBD3000004VR&target_type=1 ZZ Top - La Grange (Live From Gruene Hall)

Available Now: https://mercury-studios.lnk.to/ZZTopDoc

Produced by the Emmy award-winning Banger Films, ZZ TOP: THAT LITTLE OL’ BAND FROM TEXAS tells the story of how three oddball teenage bluesmen - Billy Gibbons, Dusty Hill, and Frank Beard – became one of the biggest, most beloved bands on the planet, all while maintaining a surrealist mystique that continues to intrigue fans and entice onlookers 50 years after the band’s inception.

Buoyed by candid band interviews, never-before-seen archive, animation, celebrity fan testimonials (Billy Bob Thornton, Joshua Homme and more), and an intimate performance at the legendary Gruene Hall shot exclusively for this documentary, “That Little Ol’ Band” runs the gamut, from the absurd to the poignant, from squalid Texas bars to MTV heroics, all in celebration of this notoriously private, but larger than life, power trio. In the end, ZZ TOP: THAT LITTLE OL’ BAND FROM TEXAS unravels the extraordinary tale of a band whose image we know, but whose story we don’t.

===================================
Subscribe: https://mercury-studios.lnk.to/YouTubeSubscribe
Official site: https://www.mercurystudios.co
===================================
#ZZTop #LaGrange #ThatLittleOlBandFromTexas
user_notes: Vidéo Officielle du titre  La Grange (Live From Gruene Hall) .

title: Deep Purple - When a Blind Man Cries solos (Guitar lesson with TAB)
youtube_description:
Get printable tabs on PATREON: https://www.patreon.com/nikolagugoski

Today's video is a guitar lesson with tab for the solos on When a Blind Man Cries by Deep Purple. If you want to improve your bending technique, you should definitely give this solo a try. Hope you'll like it
